title: Bounded Bodies, JSON, Forms, Multipart Uploads, and Validation · Execution Trace: Form Multipart File Boundaries
summary: A create endpoint trusts Content-Length, decodes one JSON value but ignores trailing data, accepts unknown fields, buffers uploads in memory, and reports internal parser errors to clients. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsgo form multipart file boundaries increment in bounded request decoding and validation pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bound URL-encoded and multipart parsing, memory and disk use, file count, part headers, filenames, content, temporary cleanup, and storage authority.
Separate transport shape validation from domain invariants, normalize only defined values, accumulate safe field errors, and preserve causality internally.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
